title.en: The great universe, the secret realm of the sou...

content.en:
The great universe, the secret realm of the source.

A Heavenly Monarch entered the Source Land, and just like Ye Tian at the beginning, all other abilities were restricted, but this Heavenly Monarch had a means in his body, a means given to him by the True Ancestor, and even the Source Land could not completely suppress this means.

This method is a state of near-insoluble nothingness, and once he enters this state, the source man cannot harm him at all.

Therefore, this Heavenly Monarch came all the way to the Origin Tree.

In the past, many Earth Venerables, Divine Generals, and Heavenly Monarchs had entered the Source Land, but they didn't care too much about it when it was just an ordinary secret realm for honing their combat skills.

Except for Ye Tian, no one saw this origin tree again.

The native beings of the Great Universe don't have much knowledge, and even if they see the Origin Tree, they don't know it at all.

But this Heavenly Monarch is the Heavenly Monarch of the Heavenly Monarch List, and he is also the Heavenly Monarch of Qi Tiandian, one of the great forces, but the Purple Qi Heavenly Monarch, who has a wide range of knowledge, and immediately recognized the Origin Tree.

"This is the Innate Origin Tree, my God! The Innate Origin Tree was born in the great universe!!!"

The Purple Qi Heavenly Monarch was extremely shocked.

However, he was different from Ye Tian, at the beginning, Ye Tian directly defeated all the source people, killed all the way here, and completed the assessment here, so he obtained the origin seed given by the origin tree.

But the Purple Qi Heavenly Monarch came here by cheating, so naturally he couldn't obtain the Origin Seed.

He did not linger any longer, but chose to leave the place of origin.

Soon, Qi Tiandian learned of the existence of the Innate Origin Tree.

Originally, Qi Tiandian didn't want to expose this secret, but what he didn't expect was that a Heavenly Monarch of Qi Tiandian inadvertently leaked the secret, and the news of the Innate Origin Tree spread at once.

Suddenly, the source land changed from an ordinary secret realm to a precious secret realm with endless potential.

......

"Origin, Innate Origin Tree!"

Ye Tian received a summons from the Yang Dragon Heavenly Monarch, and then received a summons from the Void Heaven Palace.

The messages are all the same, they are all about the innate origin tree of the source.

"Innate Origin Tree!"

Ye Tian had long known about the situation in the source place, but he didn't investigate much, after all, he couldn't enter the source place again, and one person could only enter it once, so he hadn't paid attention to this information all along.

Subsequently, he investigated the secrets of the Innate Origin Tree, and only then did he truly realize the value of the original Origin Tree.

"The Innate Origin Tree contains the Innate Origin, which is the purest Origin between Heaven and Earth, and it is the Origin that can be absorbed by people. Once you absorb the Origin, you can transform your talent into a Origin Talent. "

Origin talents are of little use to the Divine Generals and Heavenly Monarchs, because they have not yet touched on the true secrets of Origin Talents.

In the past, Ye Tian couldn't find out the news of the Origin Talent, and there was no Void Heaven lineage.

Because the intelligence level of the Origin Talent is too high, it is the secret of the level of the True Ancestors, so he can't find it.

But now, the Innate Origin Tree has appeared, and the news about the Origin Talent has naturally spread.

The Origin Talent corresponds to the Origin Divine Power, which is the true perfect embodiment of the Great Dao Origin and the strongest Divine Power above the Chaos Divine Power.

Moreover, the Origin Divine Power cannot be inherited or learned, so it can only be perceived and created by itself.

But if you want to create Origin Divine Power, the premise is that you must have Origin Talent!

However, it's too hard to get the Origin Talent.

In the chaos, everyone's talent is actually imperfect, and the origin talent is a transformation above the perfect talent, if you want to directly transform from the imperfect talent to the origin talent, you can only use the innate origin tree, which is also the only way at present.

However, if you want to absorb the purest innate origin transformation talent from the innate origin tree, it is also very difficult, but at least it is promising.

"I underestimated that Innate Origin Tree, if I had known that it was so precious, I should have told the master in the first place!" Ye Tian smiled bitterly.

If he had told his master at the beginning, he would have received a lot of rewards!

Of course, even if it is a void sky, don't want to monopolize the innate origin, that's unrealistic.

To be honest, Ye Tian was not very interested in the Innate Origin Tree.

At the beginning, although he was sent away by the spirit of the Innate Origin Tree with an Origin Seed, his Origin Seed was still being used to a good extent, at least all of his perfect talents were transformed into Origin Talents.

His talent had become an origin talent, and the Innate Origin Tree was almost useless to him.

But not long after, Ye Tian became interested in the source again.

Not for anything else, just because of a piece of news.

Some Dao Ancestors specially teamed up to transform the source area in the air, and then sent some of the real Tianjiao extraction consciousness in the chaos to the source place.

The real source will block talents, but after the transformation of the Dao ancestors, they can carry talents into the source land, but they are very fair to each other, and their cultivation strength is the same.

Everyone can only maintain the peak cultivation of the Earth Venerable in the source place, and the supernatural powers and secret skills will still be restricted, only the heavenly power can be brought in, and other things cannot be brought in.

If you want to be powerful in the Source Territory, you can only create new secret skills, and you must comply with the rules of the Source Territory.

"Divine Generals, Heavenly Monarchs, True Monarchs, and even some True Ancestors will enter the Source Land!"

Ye Tian was excited.

This is an opportunity, he can completely copy some of the more anti-heaven talents, and what he cares about the most is the supernatural talent.

His supernatural talent is only god-level, which is a special talent that is difficult to improve to the super-god level, and can only copy other people's super-divine talents.

If he encounters a demon with a supergod-level super-enlightenment talent, he will make a lot of money.

"Dao ancestors transform the source place, even if I have entered the source place, I can enter it again this time!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He decided, to enter the source again.

And as a Taoist ancestor, he naturally has this quota to enter.

Time flies, and thousands of years have passed.

Dao Ancestors can't enter the Great Universe, the power that extends in them is limited, and they need to pay some price, so it is naturally very difficult to transform.

A group of Dao Ancestors cooperated, and it took thousands of years to finally complete the transformation of the source area.

And this source place also has a new name - the Innate Realm!

this day.

Those who have obtained the quota to enter the Innate Realm have obtained a token, and they can enter the Innate Realm with the token in hand.

After Ye Tian got the token, he opened the token, and the whole person instantly entered the innate realm.

Innate Realm, Innate City!

Ye Tian appeared here, and when he saw this magnificent giant city, as well as the Innate Origin Tree located in the center of the giant city, he was immediately amazed by the magnificent power of the Dao Ancestors.

That's too much of a transformation!

Dao Ancestors separated the area of the infinite territory, and their power extended into a secret realm within the great universe, and they could also transform it, such means were too unimaginable.

Moreover, Ye Tian obviously felt that there had been some slight changes in the rules of the Innate Realm, which was obviously the rules modified by the Dao Ancestors, making the Innate Realm more suitable for outsiders to enter.

"The source is gone!"

Ye Tian probed around and said secretly.

Obviously, the Innate Realm has lost its usefulness in training combat skills.

In fact, the help of training combat skills was not great, and the reason why he obtained amazing benefits in the Innate Realm was that he could copy the perfect talents of those Source Men in the Innate Realm, which was his greatest gain.

And others can't copy the talent, so naturally they don't care about the source people.

"Ten Thousand Laws!"

A voice came.

Ye Tian found the Cloud Purple Goddess, and the other party was walking towards him.

"It turned out to be the Cloud Purple Divine Maiden!" Ye Tian said with a smile.

"Ten Thousand Laws Daozi, I only dare to talk to you in the Innate Realm. Now you are the Heavenly Monarch at the top of the Heavenly Monarch List, and the little girl is still in the Divine General!" Yun Zi Divine Maiden sighed.

"Where is the Yunzi Divine Maiden, with your talent, it will be easy to enter the Heavenly Monarch List in the future. I don't know if the Yunzi Divine Maiden knows much about the Innate Realm, does she have any inside information?"

Ye Tian said curiously.

"The master of the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi is the one, isn't there any inside information?"

"Uh, no!"

Ye Tian said embarrassedly.

From the discovery of the Innate Origin Tree to the present, his master has not informed him, nor has he talked to him.

However, his master knew that he had a lot of origin talents, and he might feel that the Innate Origin Tree would not help him much, so he felt that there was no need to introduce him to the situation in the Innate Realm.

The Yunzi Divine Maiden did not continue to ask, but began to introduce to Ye Tian: "Ten Thousand Laws Daozi, the rules of the Innate Realm have changed now, there is a huge and incomparably large Origin World inside the Innate Origin Tree, we can enter it, challenge some Innate Origin People, and kill the Source People can absorb a wisp of Innate Origin Qi from the other party, so as to slowly transform the Origin Talent." However, the Innate Source People are very powerful, and our cultivation in the Innate Realm can only reach the peak of the Earth Venerable, and they only bring talent, not other magical powers and secret skills, and the combat skills of the Innate Source People are very terrifying, and the cultivation is comparable to ours, but the combat power is far beyond us. In addition, we can't stay in the innate realm for a long time, as short as a hundred years, or as long as a thousand years, we will be excluded, and even Dao Ancestors can't do anything. After all, Dao Ancestor can only change the rules of the Innate Realm slightly, if he forcibly modifies them all, the Innate Realm will collapse, and all opportunities will be empty!"

"I see!"

Ye Tian suddenly realized.

From this point of analysis, it is also more difficult for others to obtain the origin talent in the innate realm, and it is difficult for those who are not real Tianjiao and talent demons to obtain the origin talent.

Moreover, it is not bad that the innate origin qi obtained can transform a talent, and it is impossible to change all the talents into source talents like him.

"In this case, my advantage is far superior to the others!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

"Ten Thousand Laws Daozi, the time of the Innate Realm is very precious, and we can't afford to waste it. According to what my master said, if our strength continues to increase, the time spent in the Innate Realm will also increase, and if the speed of progress is very fast, we may be able to stay for more than a thousand years. Let's not talk about it first, I want to create a secret technique suitable for the innate realm first. "

With that, the Yunzi Priestess took her leave and left.
